prompt: Fix the todo list filter that returns wrong results

turns.content:
<task>
Fix the todo list filter — filtering by 'completed' status returns incomplete tasks and vice versa.
</task>

arguments.reasoning: Line 32: `item.Completed != completed` — uses != instead of ==. This returns items that DON'T match the filter, which is inverted. Should be `item.Completed == completed`.

arguments.summary: Fixed Filter() in pkg/todo/todo.go:32 — comparison was inverted (`!=` instead of `==`), returning items that didn't match the filter. One-character fix. All 4 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Fixed inverted filter logic in pkg/todo/todo.go. Filter() used != instead of == for the completed comparison, returning wrong results. All 4 tests pass.
